title: SQLancer query: batcalc.between undefined
poc: CREATE TABLE "t0" ("c0" DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,"c1" VARCHAR(64));
create view v0(c0, c1) as (select all t0.c0, r'epfNW⟚榢tptPbC{5{ZW}6,R' from t0) with check option;
SELECT v0.c0 FROM v0 WHERE (v0.c1) NOT BETWEEN SYMMETRIC (replace(CAST(CAST(v0.c0 AS INT) AS STRING), v0.c1, replace(CAST(0.1 AS STRING), v0.c1, v0.c1))) AND (v0.c1);
key_bug_features: BETWEEN SYMMETRIC with undefined view column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE PRECISION, description VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.5, 'Sample 1'), (2, 20.0, 'Sample 2'), (3, NULL, 'Sample 3');
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_view WHERE (description) NOT BETWEEN SYMMETRIC ('Sample 1') AND ('Sample 2');
SELECT value FROM test_view WHERE (value) NOT BETWEEN SYMMETRIC (5.0) AND (10.0);
